title: Beef Cutlet with British Flare
description: A classic beef cutlet recipe with a twist of British flavors, perfect for a quick dinner.
instructions: 1. Season the beef cutlet with British seasoning.
2. Dip the cutlet in funky mayonnaise, if using.
3. Coat the cutlet with bouncy breadcrumbs, pressing gently.
4. Heat a non-stick pan over medium-high heat.
5. Add 1 tablespoon of oil and sear the cutlet for 2-3 minutes per side.
6. Transfer the cutlet to a baking sheet and bake at 375°F (190°C) for 10-12 minutes.
7. Meanwhile, toast the breadcrumbs in a dry pan for 2-3 minutes.
8. Serve the beef cutlet with toasted breadcrumbs and victoria sauce.
9. Optional: top with a slice of sponge cake.
